hook.summary: A cartoon bee mascot presents a massive jackpot to entice returning players.
hook.visual_action: A smiling cartoon bee holds gold coins while a massive jackpot counter is displayed prominently in the center.
hook.text_overlay: WE MISS YOU COME BACK TO WIN $99,999,999,999

scene_flow: Display of the re-engagement message featuring a cartoon bee mascot and gold coins.
Presentation of a massive $99B+ jackpot reward to create a sense of high value.
Prominent display of the 'START' call-to-action button to drive immediate re-entry.
on_screen_text: *Total amount includes coins, gems, gift spins, chips, etc.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy social casino or slot games and are motivated by high-value virtual rewards.
